◆ isDereferenceablePointer()

bool isDereferenceablePointer ( const Value * V,
const DataLayout * DL,
SmallPtrSetImpl< const Value * > & Visited )
static

Check if Value is always a dereferenceable pointer.

Test if V is always a pointer to allocated and suitably aligned memory for a simple load or store.

Definition at line 483 of file Value.cpp.

References llvm::dyn_cast(), llvm::gep_type_begin(), llvm::DataLayout::getABITypeAlignment(), llvm::APInt::getActiveBits(), llvm::ArrayType::getNumElements(), llvm::Type::getPointerElementType(), llvm::DataLayout::getTypeStoreSize(), llvm::ConstantInt::getValue(), llvm::ConstantInt::getZExtValue(), I, llvm::SmallPtrSetImpl< PtrType >::insert(), llvm::isa(), isDereferenceablePointer(), llvm::Type::isSized(), and llvm::ConstantInt::isZero().
